hook: The best confidence environments are not necessarily exciting; they are regular enough to make repetition normal.
body: Familiarity lowers the psychic cost of social effort and lets better behavior compound over time.

hook: Some men keep seeking dramatic social settings when what they actually need is a reliable place to get reps.
body: Choose environments that reward frequency, not just bravery.

hook: Choose environments that reward frequency, not just bravery.
body: A neighborhood coffee shop where you become known may build more real ease than a once-a-month big night out.

hook: A neighborhood coffee shop where you become known may build more real ease than a once-a-month big night out.
body: Look for one place where becoming a regular would naturally increase your social range.
